title: klasea radiata subsp. radiata
intro: Klasea radiata subsp. radiata, also known as Borage or Starflower, is a plant species belonging to the Boraginaceae family. It is renowned for its medicinal properties, particularly its rich content of gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), which is an essential omega-6 fatty acid with anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Klasea radiata subsp. radiata include its ability to alleviate symptoms of menopausal hot flashes, improve skin health, and reduce inflammation, making it a popular herbal remedy for various conditions. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as capsules, tinctures, and teas, to harness its medicinal benefits.
